<\!DOCTYPE html> Cursive Terminal Themes Gallery - 33 Beautiful Themes

Cursive Terminal Themes

33 Beautiful Themes for Your Cursive Coding Experience

Quick Install

git clone https://github.com/midnightnow/Cursive-Terminal && cd Cursive-Terminal && ./scripts/theme-selector.sh
<\!-- Dark Themes (9) -->
✨ Cursive Elegance
Purple/Gold - Sophisticated and elegant
🧛 Vampire's Letter
Black/Red - Dark velvet night
🏴‍☠️ Pirate's Scroll
Brown/Gold - Weather-beaten parchment
🌃 Midnight in Tokyo
Navy/Neon - Cyberpunk night
🧙 Wizard's Grimoire
Purple/Green - Mystical spellbook
💕 Love Letter
Pink/Red - Romance and passion
🦇 Gothic Invitation
Black/Silver - Dark ceremony
🔒 Secret Diary
Indigo/Lavender - Hidden thoughts
💻 Hacker's Manifesto
Green/Black - Matrix terminal
 <\!-- Light Manuscript Themes (6) -->
📜 Ancient Papyrus
Beige/Brown - Aged papyrus
📋 Parchment Note
Cream/Sepia - Medieval manuscript
🖋️ Calligraphy Practice
White/Ink - Classic penmanship
🎨 Illuminated Manuscript
Ivory/Gold - Ornate medieval art
🔍 Invisible Ink
White/Pale Blue - Secret messages
⌨️ Typewriter Draft
Paper/Ink - Classic typing
 <\!-- Colorful Themes (6) -->
🌈 Rainbow Prism
Dark/Vibrant - Rainbow highlights
💡 Neon Sign
Black/Neon - Electric glow
🎨 Artistic Palette
Canvas/Paint - Artist's colors
🌲 Forest Grove
Green/Brown - Natural woodland
🌊 Ocean Depths
Blue/Teal - Deep sea
🍭 Cotton Candy
Pink/Blue - Sweet pastels
 <\!-- Business Document Themes (6) -->
📊 Executive Memo
Gray/Blue - Corporate professional
⚖️ Legal Document
White/Black - Formal contract
💰 Invoice Statement
Cream/Green - Financial document
📐 Blueprint Tech
Blue/White - Technical drawing
📊 Presentation Deck
White/Accent - Clean slides
📜 Contract Seal
Ivory/Gold - Official document
 <\!-- Feather-Light WCAG Themes (6) -->
☁️ Cloud Nine
Sky Blue/White - Airy and light
🍦 Vanilla Cream
Cream/Brown - Soft warmth
🏳️ Linen Sheet
Off-White/Gray - Clean fabric
🌫️ Morning Mist
Gray/White - Soft fog
🦪 Pearl Shimmer
Iridescent/White - Subtle shine
🌙 Moonlight Sonata
Silver/White - Gentle night
